<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>ThreadLock — Don't let the paperwork win.</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Sora:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-orange: #E85D04;
            --brand-dark: #0d1520;
        }
        body {
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            background-color: #080d14;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            margin: 0;
            color: white;
        }

        .hero-container {
            background: var(--brand-dark);
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1200px;
            border-radius: 24px;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        }

        .nav-link {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
            transition: color 0.2s;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
        }
        .nav-link:hover { color: white; }

        .headline {
            font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif;
            font-size: clamp(36px, 5.5vw, 60px);
            font-weight: 800;
            line-height: 1.05;
            letter-spacing: -0.03em;
            color: white;
        }
        .headline span {
            color: var(--brand-orange);
        }
        .sub-headline {
            font-size: 17px;
            line-height: 1.7;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
            max-width: 480px;
        }

        /* Dashboard Visuals */
        .visual-container {
            perspective: 1200px;
            position: relative;
            height: 500px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .dashboard-card {
            position: absolute;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
            overflow: hidden;
            box-shadow: 0 30px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
            background: #1a222c;
        }

        @keyframes float {
            0%, 100% { transform: rotateY(-15deg) rotateX(10deg) translateZ(80px) translateY(0px); }
            50% { transform: rotateY(-12deg) rotateX(8deg) translateZ(80px) translateY(-15px); }
        }

        .card-1 {
            width: 440px;
            height: 320px;
            z-index: 1;
            transform: rotateY(-15deg) rotateX(10deg);
            top: 20px;
            right: 60px;
            opacity: 0.8;
            filter: brightness(0.8);
        }

        .card-2 {
            width: 480px;
            height: 340px;
            z-index: 2;
            bottom: 40px;
            right: -20px;
            animation: float 6s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        .dashboard-img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            object-position: top left;
            display: block;
        }

        .btn-primary {
            background-color: var(--brand-orange);
            color: white;
            padding: 18px 40px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.3s;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(232, 93, 4, 0.4);
            font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif;
            cursor: pointer;
            border: none;
        }
        .btn-primary:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(232, 93, 4, 0.5);
            background-color: #ff6a00;
        }

        .btn-secondary {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
            color: white;
            padding: 18px 40px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 16px;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .btn-secondary:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
            border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        }

        .glow {
            position: absolute;
            width: 400px;
            height: 400px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(232, 93, 4, 0.15) 0%, rgba(232, 93, 4, 0) 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        .label-tag {
            font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 700;
            letter-spacing: 0.14em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--brand-orange);
        }

        .trust-text {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .trial-note {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
            font-weight: 500;
            letter-spacing: 0.01em;
        }

        @media (max-width: 1024px) {
            .visual-container { height: 400px; margin-top: 40px; }
            .card-1 { width: 340px; height: 240px; right: 40px; }
            .card-2 { width: 380px; height: 260px; right: 0; }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .hero-container { border-radius: 0; padding-bottom: 40px; }
            .visual-container { height: 350px; transform: scale(0.85); margin-top: 0; }
            .card-1 { display: none; }
            .card-2 { position: relative; right: 0; bottom: 0; transform: none; animation: none; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%; max-width: 400px; }
            .btn-primary, .btn-secondary { width: 100%; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div class="hero-container">
        <div class="glow" style="top: -100px; left: -100px;"></div>

        <!-- Navigation -->
        <nav class="flex items-center justify-between px-8 py-6 border-b border-white/5 relative z-20">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-1">
                <div class="w-8 h-8 bg-[#E85D04] rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center mr-2">
                    <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M2 20a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h16a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V4a2 2 0 0 0-2-2H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16Z"/><path d="M10 10l4 4m0-4l-4 4"/></svg>
                </div>
                <span class="text-white font-black text-2xl tracking-tighter" style="font-family:'Sora',sans-serif">Thread</span>
                <span class="text-[#E85D04] font-black text-2xl tracking-tighter" style="font-family:'Sora',sans-serif">Lock</span>
            </div>

            <div class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-10">
                <a class="nav-link">Product</a>
                <a class="nav-link">Resources</a>
                <a class="nav-link">Pricing</a>
                <div class="h-4 w-[1px] bg-white/10"></div>
                <a class="nav-link">Log in</a>
                <button style="font-family:'Sora',sans-serif" class="bg-white text-[#0d1520] px-5 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors">
                    Start Free Trial
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <!-- Main Body -->
        <div class="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 px-8 py-16 lg:py-24 items-center relative">
            <div class="space-y-10 z-10">
                <div class="space-y-6">
                    <!-- Label -->
                    <p class="label-tag">Civil Case Management</p>

                    <!-- Headline -->
                    <h1 class="headline">
                        Don't let the<br><span>paperwork win.</span>
                    </h1>

                    <!-- Sub-headline -->
                    <p class="sub-headline">
                        ThreadLock gives you the tools to build your story, understand the process, and walk into any civil matter without the confusion. No legal background required.
                    </p>
                </div>

                <!-- CTAs -->
                <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4">
                    <button class="btn-primary">
                        Start Your Free Trial
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn-secondary flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                        <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polygon points="5 3 19 12 5 21 5 3"></polygon></svg>
                        See How It Works
                    </button>
                </div>

                <!-- Trust signals -->
                <div class="flex items-center gap-6 pt-2">
                    <div class="flex -space-x-3">
                        <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full border-2 border-[#0d1520] bg-slate-600 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white">JM</div>
                        <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full border-2 border-[#0d1520] bg-slate-700 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white">TR</div>
                        <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full border-2 border-[#0d1520] bg-slate-500 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white">AL</div>
                    </div>
                    <p class="trust-text">Trusted by <strong style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7)">500+</strong> self-represented litigants</p>
                </div>

                <!-- Trial note -->
                <p class="trial-note">7 days free &nbsp;·&nbsp; No credit card required</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Visuals -->
            <div class="visual-container">
                <!-- Back Card: Timeline Insights -->
                <div class="dashboard-card card-1">
                    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Timeline Insights" class="dashboard-img">
                </div>

                <!-- Front Card: Build Your Case -->
                <div class="dashboard-card card-2">
                    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Case Actions" class="dashboard-img">
                </div>

                <!-- Decorative glow -->
                <div class="absolute w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-[#E85D04] rounded-full blur-[140px] opacity-10 -right-40 -bottom-40 -z-10"></div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

</body>
</html>
